name: Information Technology
description: Technology sector specific rules and overrides focusing on software capitalization, R&D treatment, and intangible assets

special_rules.name: R&D Capitalization Review
special_rules.description: Technology companies often capitalize R&D expenses inappropriately. Flag cases where R&D capitalization exceeds 10% of total R&D spend

special_rules.name: Acquired Technology Writedown
special_rules.description: Technology acquisitions often result in overvalued acquired technology assets. Apply conservative writedown for acquired tech assets older than 3 years

special_rules.name: SaaS Deferred Revenue Quality
special_rules.description: For SaaS companies, flag unusual patterns in deferred revenue that may indicate channel stuffing or aggressive revenue recognition

special_rules.name: Cloud Infrastructure Adjustment
special_rules.description: For cloud service providers, distinguish between productive infrastructure investments and speculative capacity expansion

special_rules.name: Cryptocurrency Holdings Assessment
special_rules.description: Technology companies holding cryptocurrency should have these treated as speculative investments with appropriate volatility adjustments
